positive: A stylized, whimsical depiction of a forest glowing with bioluminescent flora. The main subject is a friendly, cartoonish fox curled around the base of an oversized glowing mushroom. The composition is centralized and symmetrical, with deep indigo and emerald green tones dominating the palette, contrasted by bright electric cyan and gold bioluminescence. The style should be detailed line art mixed with digital painting, favoring clean, crisp silhouettes and strong contrast suitable for a t-shirt print. High depth of field, centered composition, sticker-art aesthetic, vibrant glow effect, forest floor details, clean edges, flat background separation.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, realistic photo, sketch, dirty, lowres
